title: Level 7.99
wikitext:
{{Rewrite|date=June 30, 2026|1=Ai assistance (portul said this can stay since its minimal)}} {{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 7.99 - "The Sequence Bridge" }}{{Background|file=521b3d3f833d77fde7160b8cc2bfb030.jpg}} {{Class Custom Image|hexagon=E|class=5e - Environmental|safety=Unsafe|security=Unstable|entity=Numerous Non-Entity Hazards|bg-image=5b79c8e9ec0cb6acc8f2a90a1b2702f0.jpg}} Level 7.99 also known as "The Sequence Bridge" is a sublevel between [[Level 7]] and [[Level 8]], of the Backrooms. ==Description== {{Blurimage|file=5b79c8e9ec0cb6acc8f2a90a1b2702f0.jpg|caption=The most popular image of Level 7.99, taken by a drone.}}{{Blurimage|file=521b3d3f833d77fde7160b8cc2bfb030.jpg|caption=Another image of Level 7.99.}} Level 7.99 takes the shape of an endless bridge that stretches away into a foggy distance. It has roadway and structural elements: metal railings and supporting beams are visible along the sides, and cables and pylons rise above the deck. Below the bridge, a dense sea of clouds fills the lower portion of the level; one cannot see past a certain length due to light mist. The level seems to have a sky that is usually partially cloudy with a sun visible at the "horizon." An endless ocean is reported to lie below the sea of clouds, as distant sounds of waves—similar to those heard in Level 7—are audible, along with sounds of light wind, which has been reported to calm many wanderers. Other than that the level will be completeley quiet, until the anamalous cycle starts. The level is most known for its dangerous anomalous properties. The bridge is highly unstable and sensitive, reacting to all but one sequence of footsteps. The M.E.G. has studied this phenomenon but so far only managed to take a few steps on the bridge; many members have been lost in the process. Once the bridge detects the incorrect sequence of footsteps, it will result in a violent chain reaction. (This anomaly will occur after being 7.59 minutes within the level. It is advised to leave before the anomaly takes place.) First, the bridge emits a humming sound, reported to come from below the clouds; it may be comfortable at first but increases in volume and intensity over time. Once the humming reaches its maximum intensity, wanderers begin to feel a subtle vibrating sensation within their bodies. The humming then suddenly stops. Similar to the sound, the bodily vibration increases rapidly. The initially pleasant weak vibrations turn into excruciating pain. These extremely strong vibrations affect every atom of the body due to an intense swinging effect (the atoms in one’s body begin swinging more and more violently). For some reason, the bridge itself does not seem to be affected. After the intense vibrations, one is usually dead, having been divided atom by atom and "evaporated" into a giant misty white cloud that then becomes part of the clouds below the bridge. Therefore it is theorized that those clouds are the "evaporated" bodies of past victims. After the vibration effect, the entire bridge slowly begins to swing, along with loud creaking sounds beeing audible. Only the Kauer Research Organization has managed to document what happens next, having developed a suit that protects against the intense vibrations. The swinging of the bridge increases rapidly, until it swings so violently that wanderers risk being flung high up and falling into the endless ocean below the clouds. After reaching its maximum swinging speed, it immediately stops and remains still for an unknown short period. Then the sky becomes completely cloudy, the environment grows misty, and a slow storm begins to form. It first starts drizzling, but then the rain becomes so strong and painful that the raindrops—reported as a water-like substance denser than water—cause severe injury as the rain molecules mix with the atoms of the clouds. The Kauer team also reported seeing tornadoes and intense winds that almost blew them off the bridge. This storm phase continues for 8.3 minutes. After that, the sky clears extremely fast and the sun appears to "grow" larger in the blink of an eye, due to unknown forces believed to come from the void. Light and temperature increase rapidly, reaching about 40 °C. After reaching its peak, the sun and temperature return to normal and the environment stabilizes. Then the bridge slowly begins to crumble and collapses increasingly fast. What happens afterwards is unknown; the Kauer team had to evacuate immediately or be doomed to fall into the ocean from the very high bridge, but it is presumed the sequence of events will continue until the level's cycle of events closes and things return to normal. The cycle will begin again if one makes the wrong sequence of footsteps. The Kauers' main reason for being in the level is to research the correct sequence of steps that must be taken to avoid triggering the cycle again. Multiple wanderers can be in the level, but they must enter in groups of four or more to avoid being separated by an isolation effect similar to the one on Level 0. Wanderers who enter with fewer than four people have never been seen again; it is believed they are transported to different times within the level. Evidence for this includes very old, corroded protection suits found hanging on metal poles. If wanderers enter as a group of four, they remain in their correct time and are not displaced. Groups of four can also use radio communication and other team-dependent equipment; these methods typically fail for lone wanderers. The level’s temperature is usually around 20 °C, drops to about 10 °C during the storm phase, and rises to approximately 40 °C during the heat period described previously.
{{Collapse|num=teehee|initial=
''Open Kauer Log''
|final=
''Recovered Logs: Logs.txt''
 |body= {{Background|file=Black-Screen.png}} ----
Log-1 ("The Unexperienced Excursion") Wanderer Rick: "I have entered the level to explore it with my group." Kauer Research Organisation: "Okay, wonderful. What is the environment like?" Wanderer Rick: "It feels great! Just us, an endless bridge, fresh air, a calming light wind, heavenly clouds and the distant sound of waves." Wanderer Rick: "We are taking our first steps through the level. It seems pretty safe. We have been walking for 3 minutes now, and no severe or immediate danger has been detected. It also appears the level is devoid of life." Kauer Research Organisation: "That is great to hear! Maybe we can spread the news and allow many wanderers to use this level as a resting point." Kauer Research Organisation: "Do you see any resources?" Wanderer Rick: "Unfortunately, no. There are no resources at all… it's just… an empty bridge, that's all." [Distant soft humming is audible] Wanderer Rick: "What the… Wanderer Rick here… Something strange is going on. The level seems to have an anomaly… note that." Kauer Research Organisation: "I copy." [Humming grows louder aggressively] Wanderer Rick: "Wanderer Rick here! Requesting backup and ear-protection supplies! The loud humming is getting way too loud. It's very painful! AGGHH!" Kauer Research Organisation: "Remain calm, we have sent a backup team and the needed supplies to the entrance of the level." [Humming stops] Wanderer Rick: "It stopped. FINALLY, my ears were about to burst. Cancel request for backup and supplies." Kauer Research Organisation: "Copied." Wanderer Rick: "I feel… I feel a vibrating sensation in my body… It almost feels calming and good…" Kauer Research Organisation: "Noted. Do you have any other symptoms — dizziness, headache, or chest pain perhaps?" Wanderer Rick: "No but… --- ARRGHHH IT HURTS AHHHH HELP ME PLEASE DEAR GOD I REGRET EVERYTHING I HAVE DONE!!! LET ME LIVE!!! ARGGHHH HELPP MEEE!!!!!!" Kauer Research Organisation: "Stay calm. A rescue team has been dispatched." Wanderer Rick: "AAAHHH I CAN'T STAND THE PAIN ANYMORE!!!!!!!!!!!!" [Screams of other group members can be heard, and the connection cuts] Kauer Research Organisation: "Rick. Rick. Rick! Do you copy!?" Kauer Research Organisation: "Cancel the rescue mission! The exploration project for this level is cancelled!" End of Log 1 Log 2 ("The Experienced Excursion") Kauer Research Organisation: "Alright — have you put on your protection suit, along with the rest of your group, Dr. Dance?" Dr. Dance: "Yes, I have." Kauer Research Organisation: "I want you all to stay still for 8 minutes. Can you do that?" (Distant chatter: a Kauer member notes the anomalies began about 8 minutes after the previous excursion entered.) Dr. Dance: "Sure thing. We haven't moved an inch since we entered the level." Kauer Research Organisation: "Good." Kauer Research Organisation: "20 minutes have passed. Notice anything remarkable?" Dr. Dance: "Nope. We still haven't moved, so don't worry about that." Kauer Research Organisation: "Alright, Dr. Dance. I want you to walk carefully and explore the level. Ask your group members to remain still." Dr. Dance: "Okay, got it — and… strange, I have the urge to walk using a sequence of dance moves I taught many students in reality… Well then, I'll just go for it." [Sounds of Dr. Dance moving with dance steps] Kauer Research Organisation: "Do you hear any weird humming?" Dr. Dance: "Nope… (light breathing for 3 minutes) Woops — just made a mistake… whatever, I'll keep walking." [Distant humming becomes audible] Dr. Dance: "The humming you mentioned is here and it's getting louder. I'll activate safety mode on my suit." Dr. Dance: "Strange… the humming has stopped. But I feel a weird, calming vibrating sensation in my body… it is very light, but seems to be getting stronger." Dr. Dance: "The vibration is a bit painful now but endurable. Is the suit supposed to protect me from this?" Kauer Research Organisation: "Exactly." Dr. Dance: "Oh — now the vibration is gone, but the bridge is slowly beginning to shake…" [Loud creaking sounds] Dr. Dance: "ARGHH THE BRIDGE IS SHAKING VIOLENTLY NOW!!!" Kauer Research Organisation: "Stay calm and hold on." Dr. Dance: "HELP! IT IS SHAKING SO VIOLENTLY — FOUR OF TEN OF MY GROUP MEMBERS HAVE BEEN FLUNG OFF!!!" (Three of them were never found; one was later found dead on Level 7.) Dr. Dance: "Woah… now it is all quiet. Finally — peace at last… Although wait. It seems like a storm is rapidly forming. Kauer, do you copy?" Kauer Research Organisation: "Yes, we copy. We are going to monitor; if anything serious occurs we will dispatch a rescue team." Dr. Dance: "Holy shit, I can see a violent tornado twisting in the distance. It has become extremely cold, and the winds are unbelievably strong! They're getting stronger and stronger!" Kauer Research Organisation: "Remain calm and follow the instructions given before entry. The suit is heavy, so you should be fine. You are here to document — don't give up now." Dr. Dance: "Okay, okay — woah, woah, WOAH! THE WINDS ARE EXTREMELY STRONG! GOD HELP ME! IT'S VERY HARD TO HOLD ONTO THE BRIDGE!" [A member screaming for help as they are carried away by the wind is heard] Dr. Dance: "FCK, FCK, F*CK — WE LOST ANOTHER MEMBER!" Kauer Research Organisation: "Remain calm—" Dr. Dance: "WHAT DO YOU MEAN 'STAY CALM'??? PEOPLE ARE DYING, DO SOMETHING!!!" Kauer Research Organisation: "You agreed to our terms and conditions. We are not responsible for his death, as he did not follow the rules." Dr. Dance: "For fuck's sake— Oh… finally the storm is over." Dr. Dance: "Wow, the sun is coming out — but wait… why is it suddenly bigger? It was smaller a second ago." Dr. Dance: "Holy… it's getting hotter… I need… water." [Sound of helmet being removed and drinking ] Dr. Dance: "Geez… I'm going to melt." [Dr. Dance collapsing is heard] [Presumably after the heat sequence, Dr. Dance regains consciousness] Dr. Dance: "Ohhh my head… at least everything seems back to how it was at the beginning — wait, what are those creaking and crumbling sounds?" Dr. Dance: "HOLY SHIT!! SEND THE RESCUE TEAM!!! THE BRIDGE IS CRUMBLING APART!!!" Kauer Research Organisation: "We have dispatched the drone-rescue team to the level's entrance." [Drone whirring is heard] Dr. Dance: "Thank God your drones can pick us up and fly us to the exit. Man, I almost died because of that." (In total 5 members were lost.) End of Log 2 [[File:Снимок экрана 2026-03-10 005228.jpg|center|250px]]
The bridge will kill us all.
}}
==Colonies and Outposts== Several attempts have been made to establish outposts that don't touch the road of the bridge that is sensitive to the footsteps of wanderers. But these were usually destroyed over time by wanderers who made the mistake of walking onto the bridge's road. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== *Finding a small bridge, that gets bigger and higher gradually, and following it usually on [[Level 7]], will lead here. ===Exits{{Transparent Theme}}=== *Going high into the sky with a drone for example, will lead one to Level 10 eventually. *Falling into the water will mostly end in death, but if survived, will lead one to [[Level 7]].
'''Open credits'''
==Content: Timothy223. *Minor redesign: Unknown *Thanks for reading, '''{{USERNAME}}'''. {{Audio|file=LEVEL 7.mp3|volume=9}} {{User:Timothy223/TimothyLevels}}{{Redirect|Prev=7.7|Next=8}}
